vadouvan-carrot-yogurt.name: Vadouvan-carrot Yogurt
instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add carrots, season with salt and pepper, and cook, tossing occasionally, until carrots are tender and beginning to brown around edges, 12–15 minutes. Add 1 Tbsp. vadouvan and garlic and cook, tossing often and reducing heat if needed, until very fragrant, about 2 minutes. Let cool slightly, then transfer to a food processor or blender. Add yogurt and lime juice; purée until smooth.
Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil and 1 tsp. vadouvan in a small skillet until spices are sizzling and very fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Divide yogurt among bowls and drizzle with spice oil. Serve with toast for dipping.
Do Ahead: Yogurt and spice oil can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill yogurt; store spice oil tightly covered at room temperature.

vegan-alfredo-pasta-with-mushrooms-argir.name: Vegan Alfredo Pasta With Mushrooms
instructions: First put the raw peanuts in a bowl and cover them with hot water.
Let them soak and soften for 1 hour.
Then drain them and make the sauce.
If your blender is too strong you can skip this process.
Clean the mushrooms with a knife and cut them into thin slices.
Finely chop the onion and break the garlic.
Cashews to yeeld creamy texture needed: strong blender or soaked in hot water or boiling for 10’ in simmering water

vegan-and-soy-free-apple-cinnamon-oat-mu.name: Vegan And Soy-free Apple Cinnamon Oat Muffins
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Preheat the oven to 180 degrees C (191°C). Grease or line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper liners.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Use a blender or food processor to blend oats into oat flour. Mix in cinnamon, nutmeg, baking powder, and salt.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Mix apples, applesauce, almond milk, oil, and vanilla together in a large bowl until combined. Slowly add the oat mixture, mixing until thick like cookie dough.'}
{'step': '4', 'description': 'Add even spoonfuls of the mixture to the muffin tins.'}
{'step': '5', 'description': 'Bake in the preheated oven until tops spring back to the touch, 14 to 18 minutes.'}
{'step': '6', 'description': 'Let cool at least 5 minutes before serving.'}

vegan-pumpkin-bread.name: Vegan Pumpkin Bread
instructions: Stir water and flaxseed meal together in a small bowl until well combined. Place in the refrigerator until flax 'eggs' have thickened, about 15 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Spray two 9x5-inch loaf pans with cooking spray.
Combine sugar and avocado oil in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until blended. Mix in flax 'eggs,' pumpkin puree, applesauce, molasses, and vanilla extract.

Sift all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, baking powder, nutmeg, and cloves together in a separate bowl. Add dry ingredients to the wet ingredients in 2 batches, stirring to combine after each addition. Divide batter between the prepared loaf pans.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 1 hour 5 minutes.

vegan-scalloped-potatoes.name: Vegan Scalloped Potatoes

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray two 9x13-inch baking dishes with nonstick cooking spray.
Layer potatoes and onions in the prepared baking dishes, seasoning each layer with salt and pepper.
Melt non-dairy butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Stir in flour until blended. Whisk in vegetable broth, stirring constantly, until sauce boils and thickens.
Pour sauce over the potatoes and onions; sprinkle paprika over the top.
Bake in the preheated oven until potatoes are tender and golden brown, about 50 minutes.

vegetable-tartlet-lezzet.name: Vegetable Tartlet

ingredients.item: 150 gr cream and milk cheese Home

instructions: 1. The necessary materials for dough knead in a deep container.
2. Add enough iced water for the toning of the dough.
3. After the dough is toned, wrap the stretch film and rest for 30 minutes in the refrigerator.
4. Heat the olive oil in the pan.
5. Peel the peel of the eggplant.
6. Scrap the shell of the container.
7. Take all vegetables in the size of the backgammon membrane to the chopstick pan.
8. After planting 4-5 minutes, add salt and pepper.
9. Take the dough on the countertop.
10. Put a little bigger bees from walnut.
11. 11. Open the size of weighing dies by spreading some flour on the dough.
12. Place your lubricated molds.
12. August Pre-heated 170 degree cook until pink.
14 July Leave the pizzeria from the oven to cool.
15. Mix cheeses, olive oil and greens that you have fine.
16. Share the cheeseed mortar then with vegetables.
17. September Decorate with pepper leaves and rest for 1-2 hours.
18. Serve.

veginoodle-lezzet.name: Veginoodle
instructions: 1. thoroughly heat the Wok pan.
2. Take the sunflower oil into the pan.
3. Cook the chopped carrot, red pepper, yellow pepper, cabbage and fine chopped fresh onion pan and so on.
4. Add Noodle in less water and to vegetables.
5. Eat soy sauce with Thai sauce wok pan with little sunflower oil.
6.  Sotelenen sebzeleri ilave edin.
7. Then add boiled noodle.
8. Serve.

veloute-soup-with-chicken-and-trachana-a.name: Veloute Soup With Chicken And Trachana
veloute-soup-with-chicken-and-trachana-a.original_name: Σούπα βελουτέ με κοτόπουλο και τραχανά
instructions: Place the chicken in a deep pot, cover it with cold water and leave it on fire, skimming when necessary.
After boiling, lower the intensity of the heat to medium and boil for 40 minutes.
Then strain the broth and, as soon as the chicken cools slightly, unboned and chop the search.
Cover it not to dry and skin.
Transfer the soup into a large jug to make it easier to serve.
In a deep dish add a spoonful of yogurt and some chopped chicken in the middle.
Set up all the dishes similarly and then pour the velvet round the chicken.

venezuelan-hot-chocolate-comedera.name: Venezuelan Hot Chocolate,

ingredients.item: 1 Venezuelan cup chocolate tablet (you can select the best in the country where you are)

instructions: Vas a colocar en una olla a calentar a fuego alto, el agua.
Later, you will add his chocolates tablet and start to mix till completely melting.
When she's melted, you'll add a cup of milk, sugar to taste, a pint of salt and a tablespoon of vanilla.
Baja el fugo, mezcla todo y deja cocinar por aproximadamente 5 minutos hasta que rompa hervor.
When you see that chocolate's bubbling up, you'll put the two tablespoons and mix them up.
Let cook for 3 more minutes and keep moving so they don't get clumsy and stick to the pot.
Apaga, sirve y decora con cacao en polvo.
Enjoy!

venison-shish-kebabs.name: Venison Shish Kebabs
instructions: Whisk the soy sauce, sugar, ginger, mustard powder, garlic powder, and cayenne pepper in a large bowl until the sugar has dissolved. Whisk in the vegetable oil, then stir in the venison cubes until evenly covered in the marinade. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap, and marinate in the refrigerator at least 4 hours. Place the wooden skewers into water to soak.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium heat, and lightly oil the grate.

While the grill is heating, remove the venison from the marinade, and squeeze off excess. Discard the remaining marinade. Thread the venison cubes onto the skewers, alternating with the onion, jalapeno, and bell pepper.
Cook the skewers on the preheated grill, turning occasionally until cooked to your desired degree of doneness, about 10 minutes total for medium-rare.

vespar.name: Vespar
instructions: Combine all ingredients except twist in a glass filled with ice. Stir until outside of glass is very cold. Strain into a coupe glass; garnish with lemon or orange twist.

vietnamese-caramel-chicken.name: Vietnamese Caramel Chicken
instructions: Combine sugar, fish sauce, and black pepper in a shallow plate and turn chicken in the marinade. Set aside for 10 minutes.
Combine water, fish sauce, sugar, and rice vinegar in a bowl. Set caramel sauce aside.

Heat a cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat. Add 1 tablespoon oil and pan-fry chicken, skin-side up, until bottoms turn slightly crispy and brown, about 5 minutes. Turn and cook until skin is slightly charred, about 5 minutes. Remove chicken from skillet and transfer to a plate.

Add remaining 2 tablespoons oil to the skillet and cook garlic for 30 seconds. Return chicken to the skillet and add caramel sauce. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook until chicken is no longer pink at the bone and the juices run clear. Caramel sauce should be reduced and turn amber in color. Add jalapenos and cook for 1 more minute.

vinegar-cucumber-salad.name: Vinegar-cucumber Salad
instructions: Combine cucumbers and ¾ tsp. salt in a medium bowl. Massage cucumbers, gently at first to keep them from breaking, then more vigorously as they release water, until they soften and expel most of their liquid. Drain, return to bowl, and toss with oil and vinegar.
Just before serving, toss dill into cucumbers; season with salt if needed.
